videos.title: Sliverless Slivers
videos.description:
Leyline of Transformation, Thrumming Hivepool, and a bunch of copium will fuel this deck!

Today's video is brought to you by Card Kingdom. You can pick up some Magic: the Gathering cards (and help support the show) at https://cardkingdom.com/mtggoldfish

► Read more about this deck (full article): https://www.mtggoldfish.com/articles/single-scoop-sliverless-slivers
